name: Cloudpattern Gourd Bottle
descs:
Slash Attack Type Skill 1: Clash Power +1, inflict 2 Offense Level Down On Hit.
- For Kurokumo Clan Identities: the above effects apply to all Slash Attack Type Skills instead

Turn Start: Kurokumo Clan Identities gain 1 Power Up; when inflicting Bleed Potency or Count On Hit with a Base Attack Skill, gain 1 Poise Potency (4 times per turn per Identity)

Slash Attack Type Skill 1: Clash Power +1, inflict 2 Offense Level Down On Hit.
- For Kurokumo Clan Identities: the above effects apply to all Slash Attack Type or Lust Affinity Base Attack Skills instead

Turn Start: Kurokumo Clan Identities gain 1 Power Up; when inflicting Bleed Potency or Count On Hit with a Base Attack Skill, gain 1 Poise Potency (6 times per turn per Identity)

Slash Attack Type Skill 1: Clash Power +1, inflict 2 Offense Level Down On Hit.
- For Kurokumo Clan Identities: the above effects apply to all Base Attack Skills instead

Turn Start: Kurokumo Clan Identities gain 1 Power Up; when inflicting Bleed Potency or Count On Hit with a Base Attack Skill, gain 1~2 Poise Potency (8 times per turn per Identity)
